name: Khabarovsk Krai (Russia)

colors.symbolism: purity, kindness, modesty, a cloudless peaceful sky, and the purity of thoughts of the inhabitants
hope, joy, abundance, the unique flora and fauna of Khabarovsk Krai, and the endless sea of taiga
beauty, gentleness, grandeur, and the vast water resources of Khabarovsk Krai

description: A horizontal bicolour of white over light blue, charged with a green isoceles triangle issuing from the hoist.

features.symbolism: white over light blue with a green hoist triangle, recalling the layout of the Czech flag with different colors.
